'''Shanto Dhil''' was a [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] and former [[Mayor/Legends|mayor]] of [[Port Bianco/Legends|Port Bianco]] on [[Lammax]].<ref name="LOTE" />
